_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Presence of Aortic Arch Aneurysm requiring replacement

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication of graft requirement, and planned line of management

claim.label: Graft details barcode/invoice (if artificial graft used)

ppd_preauth.q: Did the clinical condition and imaging confirm the diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Does the severity and imaging indicate surgery?
Was graft detail (barcode/invoice) available in case of artificial graft?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical condition, severity, or imaging not indicative of surgery for aortic arch replacement
Graft details (barcode/invoice) not provided for artificial graft used
Pre-authorization documents (Clinical notes, CXR, ECG, 2DECHO, CT/MRI) are incomplete or do not adequately support the diagnosis/planned treatment
Detailed Procedure/Operative notes are missing or lack critical details about the surgical steps
Intraoperative neurologic monitoring documentation is missing if applicable

additional_information.special_empanelment: Care at a Tertiary Hospital with equipped facilities for bypass
clinical_key_pointers: Aortic arch aneurysm can result from atherosclerosis, trauma, congenital disorder, Takayasu's arteritis, or infection. Atherosclerosis is the most common cause of aortic arch aneurysm.
Usually asymptomatic, may have been detected radiologically.
In case of aorto-arteritis, the patient may have additional limb claudication or constitutional symptoms
additional_information.referral_criteria: Referral of cases to the appropriate level of care (as required) for treatment of patients under PMJAY and selection of corresponding Health Benefit Package.
